description:
Buckle up for the most destructive driving experience! Hyper Cars Ramp Crash combines high-speed racing with extreme, physics-based chaos. Whether you're launching off massive ramps, dodging crushing hammers, or falling from the sky, every dent and scratch is rendered with realistic crash physics.

Take control of seven distinct super sports cars that are fully customizable to match your style. Push them to the limit in a massive open world or test your precision in the challenging stunt and fall modes. Want to share the chaos? Grab a second controller and challenge a friend in two-player split-screen mode across all game modes.

Key Features:
• Realistic Destruction Physics: Watch your car crumble, smash, and deform in real time when you hit obstacles or land massive jumps.
• Seven Super-Sport Cars: Unlock and drive a garage full of high-performance vehicles. Customize them and view the action from a realistic interior cockpit camera.
• Couch Co-Op Multiplayer: Play alone or team up/compete with a friend in local split-screen mode.
• Multiple Adrenaline Modes: Free Style, Stunt Mode, Fall Break Mode, Time Trial.
• Diverse Environments: Master your driving skills on Road, Forest, Ocean, and Desert maps.
